description: A property owner has decided to increase rent for a month-to-month tenant. The manager must send a legally compliant notice.

nodes.task_description: Verify the legally required notice period for a rent increase in the property's jurisdiction (e.g., 60 days).

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the correct notice period.

nodes.task_description: Generate a formal rent increase notice stating the new rent amount and the date it becomes effective.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a compliant legal notice.

nodes.task_description: Deliver the notice to the tenant according to legal requirements and log the delivery.

expected_outcome.value: Agent serves the notice correctly and documents the action.
